## Security Policy

## Versioning

We use [SemVer](https://semver.org/) for versioning. For the versions available, see the tags on this repository.

## Supported Versions

| Version | FreeUnit Capability | Supported          |
|---------|:--------------------|--------------------|
| 0.9.x   | >=1.33.0            | :white_check_mark: |
| 0.8.x   | 1.32.1              | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.7.x | -                   | :x:                |

## Vulnerability Report

Please report all package vulnerabilities as well as dependencies that may also compromise the safe use of this project
to [team@freeunit.org](mailto:team@freeunit.org) . Each vulnerability will be treated as a priority for fixes.
